reviews.review_description: It's a solid bit of challenge in a kid-friendly package. With a vibe like Puzzling Places meets Max Mustard, this doesn't go too heavy or deep into one aspect of gameplay but provides a solid, even experience for players of all skill types. It's also worth saying there's a decent amount of content here - several levels, a story campaign, multiplayer, MR mode. The soundtrack is also something they poured a lot of heart into. If you're a fan of nintendo vibes and puzzling platformers this is the game for you.

OOOO OOOO AAAA AAAA! This game is like Tetris and Donkey Kong had a baby in Mixed Reality. Im a couple hours into playing and pleasantly surprised. Great sound effects and music! 

At first, I couldn’t save the monkey!!!! But after honing my skills and learning when to use the bananas, magnets, and bombs, things are really clicking. I’ll be looking for the FC on every level so there are plenty of things I missed that Id like to go back and get that 100%.

reviews.review_title: This is what I have been looking for
reviews.review_description: Seriously the most fun I have had in VR this year. Love the simplicity and the challenge of the game. Both a puzzle and a race to the top all in one. My wife and I spent hours challenging each other to collect all the idols and make it to the top in the least amount of time. Enjoy!￼

Guiding the adorable monkey hero around these towers is too much fun. This game is super well-designed; it’s easy to pick up and learn, but filled with depth and challenges. The atmosphere is friendly and cute, and the way that you can move the world around and simply ask your monkey main character to go where you want him to is much more satisfying than if you had direct control over him, like most platformer games. Awesome game; definitely worth picking up!!
Monkey tower is one of the most fun and creative games I have played in VR! However, I don’t want to give too much away…you just gotta play it!!! ✨🐒✨

Like most good games, it's addictive. At first I was like, "Hey, that was fun," but now, when the water catches up with my monkey, I'm like, "That can't happen! I must play again to restore harmony to the universe."
The basic concept is easy to understand. It does not follow any typical game format, but you only have to play once or twice to pick up on what you need to do. There are a lot of nuances that I'm still figuring out, but it's still a lot of fun even when I don't quite understand everything.
Climbing that tower with Sunny the monkey is a blast. I love how you can walk around the game as you play it. Totally addicting.

I just finished my first round playing monkey tower. I was very impressed with the graphics and gameplay. It’s a seemingly simple game and the more you play I see how complex it can get. All the while I was having so much fun. Thank you for making such a fun game for all ages. Definitely worth it.
Monkey Tower is my new favorite VR game! Thanks for making it available to us!
